SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DVAID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, PGE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO INTREN, INC., AND LIAM MACOMB, AND TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-06-2011 AT 10:00AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSWALD, CARRON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY, LAW-CLAIMS DEPARTMENT $1,010.33 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.33, DEFENDANTS LIAM MACOMB, TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY, AND INTERN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF JUSTIFIABLY RELIED ON PG&E'S REPRESENTATIONS THAT THE CLAIM WOULD BE PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
